title: Stable cursor pagination across group-by + aggregates
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.leaderboard/1` that returns a cursor-paginated leaderboard of categories ordered by `(total_posts desc, category_id asc)` as the unique sort. Each row has `category_id, category_name, total_posts`. Cursor is `{count, id}`. Apply keyset filtering on the aggregated result via `having`, because `where` cannot reference aggregates. Handle `nil` cursor as first page. Limit to 10 per page. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Cursor pagination over an aggregated column requires `having` for the keyset filter. Subtle pattern.
